changelog:
v1.5.0 - Advanced AI Model Integration

- New NVIDIA NIM model catalog: DeepSeek V4 Flash, Nemotron 3 Ultra/Super/Nano, GLM-5/5.1, Kimi K2/K2.6, Llama 3.2 11B Vision
- Programmer screen: model selector dropdown with 10 high-performance coding models, auto-fallback on failure
- General Chat: upgraded to Llama 3.2 11B Vision multimodal model for text+image understanding
- Nemotron Content Safety guardrail for all role chats: non-blocking safety check on every AI response
- New OpenAIEngine factories: nvidiaNim(), glm(), kimi() for specific model APIs
- Fixed attachment bugs: ordering, try-catch, mounted checks, 429 infinite loop, hardcoded MIME type, user bubble rendering
- Robust error recovery: engine init failures fall back to default model gracefully
